sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: ALPS Active REIT ETF declares quarterly distribution of $0.1817
feed.summary: ALPS Active REIT ETF has declared a quarterly distribution of $0.1817 per share. This distribution is payable on March 28, 2026, to shareholders of record as of March 25, 2026. The ex-dividend date is March 22, 2026.

feed.title: Stryker cyberattack delays surgeries for some patients
feed.summary: A cyberattack on medical technology company Stryker Corp. has led to delays in surgeries for some patients due to disruptions in ordering, manufacturing, and shipping of custom implants. The pro-Iranian digital activist group Handala claimed responsibility for the attack. Despite the company stating the incident has been contained and most inventory is available, patients like five-year-old Emmie Forrest and Adam Page have had critical procedures rescheduled.

Whitaker, institutional investors collectively own 57.41% of the company's stock, and analysts maintain a "Hold" consensus rating with a target price of $65.11.

feed.title: Truist Cuts PT on Boston Scientific Corporation (BSX) to $92 From $95 – Here’s Why

UBS also cut its price target to $105 from $120. Boston Scientific reported strong fiscal Q4 and full-year 2025 net sales, with Q4 sales reaching $5.286 billion, representing a 15.9% growth.

feed.title: Is Franklin Resources Stock Outperforming the Nasdaq?
feed.summary: Franklin Resources (BEN) has a market capitalization of $12.4 billion, making it a large-cap stock in the asset management industry. While BEN has declined 2.3% over the past three months and 1.8% YTD, it has outperformed the Nasdaq Composite's (NASX) 7.1% drop and 6.9% fall during the same periods. However, over the past 52 weeks, BEN's 17.2% gain has lagged NASX's 22.4% gain, and analysts currently rate BEN as a "Hold" despite its recent positive Q1 earnings.

feed.title: Pitney Bowes Inc stock faces analyst scrutiny amid shifting price targets and earnings outlook

This transformation, along with a favorable valuation and exposure to e-commerce logistics, makes the stock an attractive consideration for DACH investors seeking diversification into U.S. industrials.
